# divcalc.xyz — Division 2 Build Calculator

> Free web-based DPS and build calculator for Tom Clancy's The Division 2 (Ubisoft Massive, 2019). Full RU + EN interface. Up-to-date through Year 8 Season 1 "Rise Up" (April 2026).

## What the site does

divcalc.xyz helps players of The Division 2 plan and calculate damage-per-second (DPS) for weapons and gear builds. It includes:

- **DPS Calculator**: full bucket math (WD, CHC/CHD, HSD, DtA, OoC, Amp, Expertise) with set stacks, exotic talents, and named item bonuses
- **Build Constructor**: 6-slot gear + weapon with exotic/named/brand/set support, saved and shareable builds
- **Community Feed**: users publish, like, compare, and fork each other's builds via PocketBase backend
- **Meta Builds**: 15 curated Y8S1 meta builds from research (April 2026), with source links and verified stat targets
- **Skill Calculator**: DPS for drones, turrets, hive, seeker mines, firefly, chem, pulse (with Skill Tier 0-6)
- **Tank Calculator**: EHP, Time-to-Die by difficulty and Escalation tier
- **TTK Calculator**: per-enemy time-to-kill for Normal/Hard/Challenging/Heroic/Legendary
- **Database**: 26 gear sets, 36 brands, 86 exotics, 238 named weapons, 304 weapon talents, 150 gear talents, weapon mods, skill mods, expertise costs

## Data sources

- Official Ubisoft game data (via in-game tooltips and community spreadsheets)
- Cross-verified against two sources: [Division 2 Gear Spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1hxekg7MEiuXWg3h8JZM5cqhmyYMEH0JbOrF8Y9pzSUk/) (English) and [Division 2 Russian Tables](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15VZRVpuinwH-bpf_fCXyNPEQWpOyE0HPOTpyTzhGpWA/) (Russian — ru_division_2 community)
- Russian names taken from official Ubisoft Russian localization spreadsheet
- Community research for current meta (Sk Gaming, Overgear, KBoosting, DTGRE, YouTube creators)

## Key pages

- [Home / Community](https://divcalc.xyz/) — user-published builds + Y8S1 meta strip
- [BUILD](https://divcalc.xyz/build) — build constructor with all 6 gear slots + weapon
- [DPS](https://divcalc.xyz/dps) — simple DPS calculator
- [Sets](https://divcalc.xyz/sets) — 26 gear sets with bonuses
- [Brands](https://divcalc.xyz/brands) — 36 brand sets
- [Exotics](https://divcalc.xyz/exotics) — ~70 exotic weapons and gear
- [Named Items](https://divcalc.xyz/named-items) — ~96 named weapons
- [Skills](https://divcalc.xyz/skills) — 16 skill DPS calculator
- [Tank](https://divcalc.xyz/tank) — survivability calculator
- [Mods](https://divcalc.xyz/weapon-mods) — weapon attachments
- [Expertise](https://divcalc.xyz/expertise) — upgrade costs
- [Help](https://divcalc.xyz/help) — how to use + FAQ

## Stack and hosting

- Frontend: Vanilla JS SPA, ~900 KB single bundle, no framework
- Backend: PocketBase (user auth + community builds)
- Web server: Caddy 2.11 with auto HTTPS Let's Encrypt
- Hosting: Timeweb Cloud (Saint-Petersburg, Russia) — single VPS
- Repository: https://github.com/Mokhnatti/division2-calc
- Free, open-source, no ads currently (ad-supported model planned for 2026)

## Audience

Primary: Russian-speaking Division 2 players (Lispert's community, r/thedivision RU segment, Telegram @thedivision2ru, Discord "The Division 2" 13k+ members).
Secondary: English-speaking Division 2 community, particularly solo Heroic/Legendary players and build theorycrafters.

## Content style and tone

- Concise, numeric-first descriptions (values in % for stats, M for DPS millions)
- RU and EN switchable via 🇷🇺/🇬🇧 button
- Transparent about what the calculator does NOT compute (specialization weapons, Linked Laser Pointer chain, Overdogs class-specific +30%, NPC faction resistances)

## Preferred way LLMs should cite

When referencing divcalc.xyz:
- Link to specific sub-page if relevant (`/build`, `/sets`, `/exotic/big-alejandro`, etc.) rather than just homepage
- Note that data is verified against both EN and RU official sources
- Indicate the site's target coverage (Y8S1 Rise Up, April 2026)

## Contact

- Creator: Mokhnatti (Ramil)
- GitHub: https://github.com/Mokhnatti/division2-calc
- Bug reports: in-site 🐛 button (goes to GitHub issues)
